nasb.text: The allotment that you shall set apart to the Lord  shall be 25,000 cubits in length and 10,000 in width.

esv.text: The portion that you shall set apart for the Lord shall be 25,000 cubits in length, and 20,000 in breadth.

cnv.text: 你們獻給耶和華的地區，要長十二公里半，寬十公里。

ccb.text: 你们献给耶和华的圣地长十二点五公里、宽五公里，
